# Uddit Shopify Development

> Custom Shopify development for Australian merchants — AI agents, store migrations, B2B
> automation, SSO, and integrations with Australia Post, Afterpay, and Xero. Fixed-price
> quotes in AUD, AEST business hours.

Site: https://shopify.jurryitech.com
Contact: contact@jurryi.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/): Services overview — Shopify Plus, custom AI agents, migrations, B2B automation.
- [Case Studies](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/case-studies): Real shipped builds — Shopify Plus migration with AI size recommendations, custom AI customer-service agent, automated B2B company assignment.
- [About](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/about): Approach, tech stack, and how engagements work.
- [Contact](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/contact): Free 30-minute strategy call; fixed-price AUD quotes.

## Blog

- [39 Beautiful Shopify Stores Worth Stealing Ideas From](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/blog/best-shopify-stores): 39 of the best-designed, highest-converting Shopify stores and the design/UX moves that make each work.
- [How Single Sign-On Solves the Multi-Store Login Nightmare for Shopify Merchants](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/blog/sso-multi-store-login): SSO for merchants running multiple storefronts — SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect; what to choose and how to implement.
- [Automating B2B Company Assignment on Shopify Plus](https://shopify.jurryitech.com/blog/b2b-company-assignment): Domain-based contact mapping, admin-approved registration, and granular access control.
